text: EPIC CLOSED. All ten child beads delivered, adversarially reviewed, and committed across 2026-07-09..11: parity matrix (63682df) -> spectral types (325b2ed) -> dense kernels (17706e2) -> symmetric eigen dense+Lanczos (1d3b217) -> partial SVD via GKL/Jordan-Wielandt (a0fedac, incl. the exact-rank-deficiency pending-right fix) -> nonsymmetric eigen dense+Arnoldi (d3ab233) -> generalized symmetric-definite eigen (77d80f4) -> GSVD full-rank pure (e2dd4c4) -> spectral laws (HEAD). Plus the added dense-spectral-kernels bead and the parity/benchmark/tuning arc that grew alongside (Breeze correctness parity 29 tests at 1e-10..1e-12; release-grade perf: gale >= pure-JVM Breeze on 23/42 pairs). RECONCILIATION vs original epic body: left eigenvectors deferred (gale-left-eigenvectors, p2); shift-invert/Around targets deferred behind the explicit target seam; iterative generalized (B-inner-product Lanczos) deferred; QZ/generalized-nonsymmetric and rank-deficient GSVD scoped to gale-v0-3-5-spectral-backend-boundary (p2, open) per parity doc §5/§9 — the epic's 'backend boundaries' phrase is satisfied by the documented Left(UnsupportedOperation)/Left(RankDeficient) seams; the boundary DESIGN bead remains open as post-epic work. Final state: coreJVM 285, coreJS 282, laws 29+29, parity 29, all green; 8 feature commits this epic.
